scripts.check:fieldtype: ! find packages/go/converter/internal -name '*.go' | xargs grep -En 'var [A-Za-z_, ]+ (ast\.)?FieldType$' || (echo 'ERROR: bare FieldType declaration found (zero-value hazard — initialise to FieldTypeInvalid)' && exit 1)
scripts.test: (cd packages/ts/runtime && ./node_modules/.bin/vitest --run) && (cd packages/ts/scene-runner && ./node_modules/.bin/vitest --run) && sh scripts/go-test.sh test && (cd packages/ts/runtime && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --project tsconfig.build.json) && (cd packages/ts/scene-runner && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --project tsconfig.build.json) && node scripts/smoke-dist.mjs
scripts.test:dist: (cd packages/ts/runtime && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --project tsconfig.build.json) && (cd packages/ts/scene-runner && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --project tsconfig.build.json) && node scripts/smoke-dist.mjs
scripts.format: find packages/go/converter -path "*/vendor" -prune -o -name "*.go" -print | xargs gofmt -w && ./packages/ts/runtime/node_modules/.bin/oxfmt packages/ts/runtime/src packages/ts/scene-runner/src packages/ts/scene-runner/tests scripts "!packages/ts/scene-runner/src/types/turnout-model_pb.ts"
scripts.check:format: test -z "$(find packages/go/converter -path '*/vendor' -prune -o -name '*.go' -print | xargs gofmt -l)" && ./packages/ts/runtime/node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check packages/ts/runtime/src packages/ts/scene-runner/src packages/ts/scene-runner/tests scripts "!packages/ts/scene-runner/src/types/turnout-model_pb.ts"
scripts.test:go:quality: sh scripts/go-test.sh vet && sh scripts/go-test.sh race
